title: Kavin Again.
content:
It is not anything he says,
    It's just his presence and his smile,
    The blarney of his silences
    That cocker and beguile.
meaning:
"Kavin Again." is a quintessential example of Bliss Carman (William)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
